description: Composition100% cotton shirt with full sleeves, has plaid checks in neutral shades of brown with white accents, brown stitch detailing, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar  with appliqued brand name on the facing placket, patch pocket on the left chest with black thread detailing, full length buttoned placket and curved hemline, and embroidered logo on pocketFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this plaid shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18" Composition100% cotton shirt with full sleeves, has plaid checks in neutral shades of brown with white accents, brown stitch detailing, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar with appliqued brand name on the facing placket, patch pocket on the left chest with black thread detailing, full length buttoned placket and curved hemline, and embroidered logo on pocketFittingRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degree CWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry on normal or line dryWarm ironGet ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this plaid shirt from locomotive.
